title: Rocket Launcher for Kids with Parachute, Flight Altitude 200 Feet, Ultra-high Motorized Air Rocket Launch for Ages 8 to14 Birthday Gift for Kid Girl and Boys Red
features: Rocket Launch Highly Outdoor Toys for Kids: Rocket launcher has maximum height of 200 feet! Pressing the launch button once will send it to 100 feet, while pressing it twice will boost it all the way up to 200 feet!

Safe Design for Kids: Rocket upgraded circular propeller is lighter and softer, allowing for higher, more stable flights and enhanced safety for kids (Note: the propeller must be installed before use). The rocket's EEP foam shell is lightweight, boosting its launch altitude. When the rocket reaches a certain height, the parachute automatically opens and lands slowly.

LED Night Lighting Rocket Launcher Toy: he built-in LED lights allow you to launch the rocket and track its flight path even at night, making it easy to locate the rocket whether it's in the air or on the ground.

Safety Delayed Launch: As the rocket toy's propeller will spin at high speed upon launch, we've implemented a 3-second delay before it starts. After placing the rocket on the launch pad and pressing the launch button, the rocket will remain stationary for 3s, allowing you time to move to a safe distance before it launches.

Rechargeable Rocket Launch Toys: The rocket has a built-in Hight quality rechargeable battery inside, USB-QC charging (the charging cable is in the package). The rocket only takes 35 minutes to fully charge, and it can launch about 25 times on a single charge, saving the cost and trouble of replacing the battery
